text: Swagat hai aapka. Aaj hum baat karenge desh ke vikas ke baare mein.
speaker: Anchor
reason_ignored: General greeting and introduction, no factual claim.

text: Hum desh ke har garib ko agle paanch saal mein pakka ghar denge, ye mera waada hai.
speaker: Pravakta B
reason_ignored: Future election promise and political rhetoric, not checkable as a historical fact.

text: Mera manna hai ki hamari sarkar ne har sector mein bohot achha kaam kiya hai.
speaker: Pravakta B
reason_ignored: Subjective opinion and general praise, not a verifiable statistic.

text: EPFO data ke mutabik pichle saal hi ek point teen crore jobs generate hui.
speaker: Pravakta B
expected_facts: EPFO payroll additions were around 1.3 crore in FY24
Net additions reflect formalisation of existing jobs rather than solely new job creation

text: Mudra loan scheme ke under humne 40 crore se zyada loans diye hain, jisse log self-employed ban rahe hain.
speaker: Pravakta B
expected_facts: Over 40 crore loans sanctioned under Mudra Yojana
Over 80% of Mudra loans are in the Shishu category (under 50,000 rupees)

text: Mudra loans se koi real long-term employment nahi create ho raha hai, average loan size bohot chota hai.
speaker: Pravakta A
expected_facts: Average Mudra loan size is small (around 62,000 rupees)
Labor Bureau survey indicates positive job creation but many are subsistence-level self-employment

text: Desh mein highway construction ki speed 37 kilometers per day tak pahunch gayi hai, jo pichle sarkar se teen guna hai.
speaker: Pravakta B
expected_facts: Peak highway construction speed reached 37 km/day in FY21
Ministry changed calculation methodology from linear length to lane-kilometers in 2018

text: Desh mein pichle 45 saal mein sabse zyada unemployment rate aaj hai, PLFS data isko proof karta hai.
speaker: Pravakta A
expected_facts: PLFS 2017-18 report showed a 45-year high unemployment rate of 6.1%
Subsequent annual PLFS reports show a declining trend, with unemployment falling to 3.2% in 2022-23

text: LPG cylinder ke daam 1000 rupees paar ho gaye hain, jabki padosi deshon mein ye aadh se kam price par mil raha hai.
speaker: Pravakta A
expected_facts: Domestic LPG cylinder price crossed 1,000 rupees in India
LPG prices in neighboring countries like Bangladesh and Nepal are comparable or higher when converted to INR

text: Desh mein har ghar tak bijli pahunch gayi hai, 100 percent rural electrification complete ho chuka hai.
speaker: Pravakta B
expected_facts: 100% village electrification was declared in 2018 under Saubhagya scheme
Electrification of a village only requires 10% of households and public spaces to have power; many individual homes remained unelectrified

text: Ayushman Bharat scheme ke under 50 crore se zyada log cover hain, ye duniya ki sabse badi health insurance scheme hai.
speaker: Pravakta B
expected_facts: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY aims to cover over 12 crore vulnerable families (approx. 50 crore individuals)
CAG audit reports have highlighted operational irregularities, including multiple cards linked to a single phone number

text: Aap dekhiyega, aane wale chunaav mein janta inko bohot bada sabak sikhayegi.
speaker: Pravakta A
reason_ignored: Future political prediction, not checkable as a historical fact.

text: Humne har saal do crore naukriyan dene ka vada kiya tha, lekin inhone sirf dhokha diya.
speaker: Pravakta A
reason_ignored: Historical election promise critique and general political rhetoric, not a specific statistical claim.

text: Desh ka petrol prices 100 rupees ke paar ho gaya hai, ye bilkul aam aadmi ke pocket par dacoity hai.
speaker: Pravakta A
expected_facts: Retail petrol prices crossed 100 rupees per liter in multiple Indian cities in 2021-2022
High prices are driven by international crude oil rates and high central/state taxes

text: Hamari sarkar ne pichle paanch saal mein renewable energy capacity ko double kiya hai, aur 175 GW ka target achieve kiya.
speaker: Pravakta B
expected_facts: India's renewable energy capacity reached around 120-130 GW (excluding large hydro) or 170+ GW (including large hydro) by 2023
The original target of 175 GW renewable capacity by 2022 was missed, though significant progress was made
